name: Cabbage and Apple Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Bacon, sliced crosswise into 1/2-inch pieces
1 Small head RED Cabbage, cored, coarsely shredded (about 6 cups)
2 Granny Smith apples, pared, cored, cut into 1/4-inch dice
1/4 tsp Pepper, freshly ground (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a medium skillet over medium heat until slightly crisp and brown, about 10 minutes. Remove to paper towels to drain.
2. Heat butter and oil in a casserole or Dutch oven over medium heat.
3. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add cabbage and continue cooking until softened, 3-5 minutes.
5. Add bacon, apples, cream, and brandy. Stir to combine.
6. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper before serving in a dish.
8. Serve hot.
